# ClauBoard

> Visual control plane for Claude Code agents.

ClauBoard is a free, open-source dashboard for launching, monitoring, and coordinating multiple AI coding agents. It provides a workflow canvas with draggable nodes, pipeline orchestration, live event streaming, and interactive messaging — all from a single operator surface.

## Key Facts

- License: AGPL-3.0
- Source: https://github.com/Sipoke123/ClauBoard
- Website: https://clauboard.dev
- Documentation: https://clauboard.dev/docs
- Tech stack: Next.js 15, React 19, Express, WebSocket, TypeScript
- Requirements: Node.js >= 20
- Storage: JSONL (default) or SQLite

## Features

- Workflow canvas with draggable agent nodes and dependency connections
- Pipeline presets: Parallel Analysis, Staged Pipeline, Review Team
- Session orchestration with dependency chains
- Live event stream via WebSocket (15 event types)
- Interactive messaging to running agents
- Agent-to-agent context sharing
- Notification engine with 5 built-in alert rules
- Plugin system for custom event types
- Docker deployment ready
- Light/dark theme

## Quick Start

```
git clone https://github.com/Sipoke123/ClauBoard.git
cd ClauBoard
npm install
npm run dev:mock
```

Open http://localhost:3000 to see the dashboard with 6 demo agents.
